org.docgene.model.TodoElement

  • Packages that use TodoElement 
    Package Description
    org.docgene.model
    Contains the documentation model.
    org.docgene.model.globals
    Contains the global elements for the wiki model.

      class  XMLTodo
      Represent the content of a <todo> tag.
